subcodes.first_line: There hath come before Our presence a leaf from thee, and from it We have found the fragrances of thy love for the Best-Beloved of the worlds. Therefore [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد حضرت بین یدینا ورقه منک و وجدنا منها روایح حبک محبوب العالمین لذا قد
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @prayer for healing, @rejection by the people of the Bayan, @rejection, opposition and persecution
